compute.description:
Searches for "Lagerhaus Tamsweg" and computes a route. Waits 15 seconds, then presses the back button to return to the map.

Repeats 100×.

search.description:
Searches for "market horlbeck" (Charleston), "kam kreta ayer" (Singapore) and "duomo di milano" (Milan), each time selecting the first result and tapping X to return to typing.

Repeats 100×.

fg_bg.description:
Opens com.google.android.calendar via `adb shell monkey`, sleeps for 25 seconds, then brings com.sygic.profi.beta back to the foreground via `adb shell am start ... NaviNativeActivity`.

Repeats 100×.

zoom.description:
Searches for 27°55'40.5"N 86°53'07.5"E (Mount Everest), taps the result, then opens the zoom controls. Zooms out 20×, then zooms back in 20×.

Repeats the zoom sequence 100×.

demonstrate.description: Searches for coordinates near Düsseldorf (Germany), computes a long route, presses Demonstrate route, and lets the simulated drive run for a fixed duration before cancelling.
